form.formComment: Placed last time (22.32) at Warrnambool in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 2.5 lengths. Box stats strong with five wins and four placings from 12 starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Scored by half a length last time (24.25) in a Grade 5 over 425m at Bendigo. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Will need the right run.
